name: ClientSpace
description: Dual-role client portal: admins manage clients, projects, tasks, and file sharing; clients get a focused view of their work. React, Node.js, and Supabase with row-level security.
thumbnailAlt: ClientSpace login screen for the admin and client portal

name: Auction.io
description: Fantasy sports auction admin: teams, player pools, bidding flow, and dashboards. Angular with Supabase auth and PostgreSQL.
thumbnailAlt: Auction.io admin dashboard showing team and player management
